title: Lorem Ipsum Generator (paragraphs, sentences, words)
shortDescription: Generate placeholder Latin text by paragraphs, sentences, or word count. Optional 'Lorem ipsum' opening line.
description: Pick a unit (paragraphs, sentences, words) and a count to generate placeholder copy for design mockups, wireframes, and CMS testing. Cryptographically random word selection.
metaDescription: Free Lorem Ipsum generator. Produce paragraphs, sentences, or word lists with one click. Cryptographically random and ready to copy into your mockup.

sections.heading: Why Lorem Ipsum?
paragraphs: Lorem Ipsum has been the standard placeholder text since the 1500s, when an unknown printer scrambled a passage from Cicero's De finibus bonorum et malorum (45 BC) to make a type specimen book. Modern designers use it because Latin-looking nonsense lets viewers focus on layout and typography rather than reading the content.

Real text introduces meaning, which can distract reviewers ('this copy isn't quite right…') from the actual goal of evaluating visual hierarchy. Lorem Ipsum is unrecognizable enough to defeat that habit, while keeping a natural distribution of word lengths and sentence rhythms.

sections.heading: How to use the output
paragraphs: Paragraphs: best for body copy in articles, marketing pages, or app onboarding. Mix with real headings if your layout depends on heading hierarchy.
Sentences: good for testimonials, cards, callouts, or list items where each entry is a single sentence.
Words: ideal for short labels, navigation items, button labels, table cells, or anywhere variable-length individual words are needed.

sections.heading: When to stop using placeholder text
paragraphs: Replace Lorem Ipsum with real (or close-to-real) copy as early as possible. Layout assumptions made on Latin nonsense often break when real content arrives — capitalization patterns, hyphenation, line lengths, and embedded links all change the visual rhythm.

For design reviews with stakeholders unfamiliar with the convention, consider 'realistic placeholder' content instead — sentences in the user's actual language with believable structure. It avoids the 'why is this in Latin?' question and surfaces real content concerns earlier.

howTo.name: Set a count
howTo.text: 1-50. Most designs need 1-5 paragraphs or 10-50 words.

howTo.name: Choose start option
howTo.text: On for the classic 'Lorem ipsum' opening; off for fully random Latin.

howTo.name: Copy the output
howTo.text: Click 'Copy' and paste into your design tool.

faq.q: Is Lorem Ipsum a real Latin text?
faq.a: Almost — it's based on Cicero's De finibus bonorum et malorum (45 BC), but words are scrambled and partial, so it doesn't translate to anything meaningful.

faq.q: Why not just type 'asdf asdf asdf'?
faq.a: Repeated letters break visual rhythm — they're either too narrow or too wide and create unnatural shapes. Lorem Ipsum has realistic word-length variety.

faq.q: Is the same text generated each time?
faq.a: No. Each click produces a fresh selection from a 60-word vocabulary using cryptographically random sampling. Click 'Regenerate' for a new sample.

faq.q: Can I use this in commercial work?
faq.a: Yes. Lorem Ipsum has been in the public domain for 500 years; the output of this generator is also free to use.

faq.q: Does the output look the same to screen readers?
faq.a: Screen readers read it as gibberish Latin. If your prototype is being usability-tested by people relying on screen readers, swap to realistic copy — Lorem Ipsum is jarring and unhelpful out loud.

faq.q: What's a good word count for a button label?
faq.a: 1-3 words. Try 'Get started', 'Sign up free', 'Continue'. The Words mode is good for ideating before settling on real copy.
No. Generation runs locally; nothing is sent to a server.

faq.q: Can I generate paragraphs of different lengths?
faq.a: Yes — each paragraph has 4-8 randomly chosen sentences, so paragraphs vary naturally.
